mapper.sql: select id, college_id, program_code, program_name, research_direction, study_mode, degree_type, is_408, protects_first_choice, status, created_at from program
mapper.insert: insert into program (college_id, program_code, program_name, research_direction, study_mode, degree_type, is_408, protects_first_choice, status) values (#{collegeId}, #{programCode}, #{programName}, #{researchDirection}, #{studyMode}, #{degreeType}, #{is408}, #{protectsFirstChoice}, #{status})
mapper.delete:
delete from program where id in
#{id}
